lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Hello there! I am known as the Makeover Mage! I have spent many years researching magics that can change your physical appearance!

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: I can alter your physical form with my magic, there's no fee. Would you like me to perform my magics upon you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about this 'make-over'.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Why, of course! Basically, and I will try and explain this so that you will understand it correctly,

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: I use my secret magical technique to melt your body down into a puddle of its elements.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: When I have broken down all trace of your body, I then rebuild it into the form I am thinking of!

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Or, you know, somewhere vaguely close enough anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... that doesn't sound particularly safe to me...

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: It's as safe as houses! Why, I have only had thirty-six major accidents this month!

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: So what do you say? Feel like a change? There's no fee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll have a makeover.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Good choice, good choice. You wouldn't want to carry on looking like that, I'm sure!

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Woah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: You still look human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... Thanks, I guess.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Hmm... you didn't feel any unexpected growths anywhere around your head just then did you?

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Good, good! I was worried for a second there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... Thanks, I guess.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Whew! That was lucky!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What was?

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Nothing! It's all fine! You seem alive anyway!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... Thanks, I guess.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Two arms... two legs... one head... it seems that spell finally worked okay!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... Thanks, I guess.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cool amulet! Can I have one?

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: No problem, but please remember that the amulet I will sell you is only a copy of my own. It contains no magical powers, and as such will only cost you 100 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough money for that.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Anyway, would you like me to alter your physical form? For you, I'll do it for free!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way! That's far too expensive.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: That's fair enough, my jewellery is not to everyone's taste.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Anyway, would you like me to alter your physical form? For you, I'll do it for free!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, here you go.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Anyway, would you like me to alter your physical form? For you, I'll do it for free!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have room to hold it. Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Anyway, would you like me to alter your physical form? For you, I'll do it for free!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Ehhh... suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Ahah!

lines.speaker: Makeover Mage
lines.text: Ooh!
